text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hello, Trainer. I'm going to do some light exercise
before we start today's training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a few days into the new year and Silence
Suzuka is aloof as always. Regardless, I try to
strike up a conversation.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
New resolutions? Um... I suppose I'd like to run a
lot more.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Well... I like to feel as though I'm not being held
back...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
So I want to run in a lot of races where I have the
freedom to be like that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her passion is unmistakable, so I pitch her an
idea. In reality, it's been on my mind for quite
some time.
choice_data_list: What do you think about going for the Classics?
What do you think about going for the Classics?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning the Classics is no small feat, but with the
speedy display Suzuka put on at her debut, she's
got a real chance.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: The Classics?!
choice_data_list:
Just imagine the scenery at the lead of those
races.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...It must be wonderful...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. Of course I'll do it.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: With that said, I think I'll go for a run right now.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but if there's anything I should focus on to
prepare, I'm happy to keep it in mind.
choice_data_list: Let's focus on upping your speed!
Let's make sure you're nice and rested first!
First things first! Happy New Year!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: My speed?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It's true that only the best Umamusume can race
in the Classics.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I won't be able to take the lead if I'm not running
at peak agility... will I?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: All right then. I want to become faster.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that decided, we work on Silence Suzuka's
running form and speed.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You think I should rest?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Well... I suppose I could go for a walk. The weather is very nice today.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Well, I'll see you at training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems she was able to rest and relax
sufficiently, as training starts more laid-back than
usual.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh! I completely forgot!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Happy New Year! Here's to another year
together!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...Oh! So, that's why you asked about my
resolutions.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that Suzuka has remembered the New Year,
we decide to visit a shrine together.
